backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the love letter UI feature to its implementation files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries describing the purpose of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file with Tailwind directives and CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes using OKLCH color values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Google Fonts (Dancing Script, Playfair Display, EB Garamond) and mounts the React app with the title 'For My Cutee ✨'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders LoveLetterPage directly with no routing or additional wrappers.

frontend/src/components/LoveLetterPage.t: Main page component rendering the full love letter UI: dark background, four floating emoji elements, a parchment-style letter container with header, body paragraphs with highlighted spans, cursive footer, wax seal, and attribution footer.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/ReplayButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/SealButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.

frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Empty file with no implemented hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartAnimation.ts: Empty file with no implemented hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserved for future React Query hooks when backend integration is needed; currently exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the dark #1a1a1a background, all love letter CSS classes (float/fadeIn keyframes, letter-container, parchment-overlay, letter-header, letter-body, highlight, wax-seal, bg-emoji), and responsive mobile breakpoint rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then mounts to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (maroon, gold, parchment), serif/cursive font families, box shadows, and animation keyframes suited for the romantic letter UI.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a single-page romantic love letter app ('For My Cutee') with its architectural notes, existing implemented features, and design specifications including dark background, floating emoji animations, and parchment-style letter container.
